narrative:
Middleburg Heights-02-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 859 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
